stories.headline: Bill Ackman shares key takeaways from Bezos interview on tax policy, AI, and economy
stories.body:
A really important and interesting interview with @JeffBezos and @andrewrsorkin about tax policy, AI, the economy, and space. Unfortunately it is only in audio form. 

Bezos argues for eliminating tax on the bottom 50%, making the case that the 3% of tax revenue from this cohort  should be made up for by eliminating government waste and fraud. I agree. 

He says that instead of vilifying the top 1% who pay 40% of Federal taxes, we should have a real debate about tax policy. 

Is making the tax system even more progressive the right answer? Will it generate more revenues or less?

Or should we endeavor to eliminate waste and shrink the size of government in order to eliminate tax on an even greater percentage of Americans?

On AI, he makes a powerful case for more jobs, in fact a labor shortage, due to growth driven by increases in AI-driven productivity. 

A must listen. 

The interview begins at 18:33.

stories.headline: Michael Bay developing movie about U.S./Iran war based on real events.
stories.body:
Michael Bay is developing a movie about the U.S./Iran war.

The film follows the story of the 2 U.S. pilots rescued after their planes were shot down during Operation Epic Fury in Iran. 

(Source: Deadline)

stories.headline: Multiple large wildfires continue to menace Southern California prompting evacuations
stories.body: Fueled by gusting winds and warm temperatures, multiple large wildfires continued to menace Southern California on Wednesday, prompting thousands of residents to evacuate, authorities said.

stories.headline: Grand jury indicts Raul Castro for conspiracy to kill US nationals
stories.body:
🚨 JUST IN — IT'S OFFICIAL: A grand jury in Florida has INDICTED former Cuban dictator Raul Castro, the brother of Fidel Castro with conspiracy to KlLL US NATIONALS, murder, and more, per Acting AG Blanche

This is related to his role in the 1995 shootdown of two civilian planes over the Florida Straits, kiIIing two Americans.

"These were HUMANITARIAN flights for the rescue and protection of those fleeing oppression," per Blanche

Raul is 94 years old. We'll see how DOJ decides to handle this.

stories.headline: Raul Castro indictment unsealed with death penalty possible for conspiracy charges
stories.body:
🚨 NOW: The indictment against former Cuban dictator Raul Castro has been UNSEALED and RELEASED

Castro faces the DEATH PENALTY.

A federal grand jury has indicted him and his co-conspirators for:

• COUNT 1: Conspiracy to KiLL US Nationals
• COUNTS 2 & 3: Destruction of Aircraft
• COUNTS 4-7: Murder

stories.headline: Story about man awarded money for posting Charlie Kirk meme
stories.body: The man who spent 37 days in jail for posting a Charlie Kirk meme on Facebook was just awarded $835,000 for a violation of his first amendment rights

stories.headline: Classic Pepsi Harrier jet ad lawsuit story
stories.body: In 1996, Pepsi ran an ad where 7 million Pepsi Points got you a Harrier jet. One guy tried to claim it. Pepsi said it was obviously a joke, and the whole thing ended up in court.

stories.headline: Chelsea Handler roast comedy clip
stories.body: Chelsea Handler goes off on Tony Hinchcliffe and Shane Gillis over their “racist” jokes at the Kevin Hart Roast on Netflix, saying White people should not joke about Black people that way, comparing it to making rape jokes.
